steps.name: Kickoff call
steps.desc: We start with a call to understand your goals and inspiration.

steps.name: We handle the rest
steps.desc: You give feedback while we design and build. Updates every two days — written notes or Loom videos, your pick.

steps.name: Unlimited revisions
steps.desc: Not quite right? Send it back. We keep revising until it's exactly what you're looking for.

steps.name: Launch
steps.desc: High quality, fast results — your project completed in just two weeks.

heroSubtitle: Web development, visual identity, and creative strategy for businesses looking to stand out. We bring your ideas to life with a fresh, professional touch — high quality, fast results.
quote: Sent it back twice, they kept revising until it was exactly right — and still launched in two weeks.

services.name: Vizaĝo — Branding
services.desc: "Face" in Esperanto. A full brand done in two weeks: custom logo, typography, colors, style guide, and the marketing materials to stay consistent.

services.name: Uzanto — UX/UI design
services.desc: "User." Research, intuitive flows, and beautiful interfaces your users will love — on the web or on mobile.

services.name: Unuigo — Design + Webflow
services.desc: "Unification." From a stunning user experience to a responsive Webflow build — one seamless, complete digital solution.

services.name: Cycles — Brand + website
services.desc: Fresh branding plus a website with 3–8 subpages, completed in two weeks — social templates included if time allows. $1.8K.

heroTitle: Brands that stand out. Sites that ship in two weeks.
